title: Tragacantha hemiphaca
taxonomy: Tragacantha hemiphaca is classified in the kingdom Plantae, specifically within the family Fabaceae. This classification places it within the order Fabales, which consists of flowering plants. Within the Fabaceae family, Tragacantha hemiphaca is further classified as belonging to the genus Astragalus, but it is sometimes referred to under the genus Tragacantha. However, the exact classification may vary depending on the source. Some sources consider Tragacantha hemiphaca to be a synonym of Astragalus hemiphacus.
